---
title: "Retail Executive Dashboard"
description: "An interactive retail analytics dashboard exploring sales performance, category drivers, customer segments, and business recommendations."
date: 03-08-2025
image: Retail_dashboard_metrics.png
categories: [retail, analytics, dashboard, business intelligence, quarto, R]
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    toc: true
    echo: false
---

## 🛍️ Retail Executive Dashboard

This project explores retail sales performance through an interactive business dashboard. The dashboard focuses on revenue trends, category performance, customer segments, and action-focused recommendations for retail decision-making.

The analysis summarises overall business performance, identifies top commercial drivers, and translates findings into practical actions.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Key Features

- 📊 **Executive Overview** showing total revenue, transactions, units sold, average order value, and top category
- 📈 **Sales Trends** tracking monthly revenue, transactions, units sold, and average order value
- 🛒 **Category Performance** comparing revenue, volume, and premium basket value across categories
- 👥 **Customer Segments** analysing revenue and transaction behaviour by gender and age group
- 💡 **Insights & Recommendations** turning analysis into clear business actions

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Interactive Dashboard

Use the embedded dashboard below to explore the retail analysis:

<iframe src="https://retail-business-dashboard.netlify.app/" width="100%" height="700px" style="border:none;">

</iframe>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Key Insights

- **Electronics is the leading revenue category**, generating the highest share of total revenue and acting as the main commercial revenue driver.
- **Category roles differ clearly**: Electronics leads revenue, Clothing leads purchase volume, and Beauty has the highest average order value.
- **Sales performance appears more volume-driven than basket-size driven**, suggesting that growth efforts should focus on traffic, conversion, and units per order.
- **May 2023 was the strongest sales month**, making it a useful benchmark for planning future promotions, stock availability, and campaign timing.
- **Female customers contributed slightly more revenue than male customers**, while the **45–54 age group** emerged as the strongest age-based revenue segment.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Business Recommendations

- Prioritise **Electronics** in revenue-focused campaigns, homepage placements, and stock availability planning.
- Use **category-specific strategies**: protect Electronics revenue, use Clothing for volume-led promotions, and position Beauty as a premium basket-value opportunity.
- Focus sales initiatives on increasing **traffic, conversion, and units per order**, rather than relying only on higher prices.
- Review the strongest month, **May 2023**, to understand what drove the performance and apply those learnings to future campaign planning.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Resources

- [Live Dashboard](https://retail-business-dashboard.netlify.app/)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ishitak22/30-days-industry-analytics/tree/main/01_retail)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Built using `R`, `Quarto`, `ggplot2`, `plotly`, `DT`, and business analytics techniques.*
